name: cloudflare-transcription
description: Audio transcription app using Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2, and AI (Whisper)
author: umemak

scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --d1=webapp-production --r2=webapp-audio-bucket --local --port 3000
scripts.dev:ai: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --d1=webapp-production --r2=webapp-audio-bucket --ai=AI --local --port 3000
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name webapp
scripts.clean-port: echo 'Port cleaning not available on Windows'
